subject: An anime-style figure with very long teal twin-tails in a blue school uniform with glasses, seated at a desk or table in an interior setting
description: The card art — viewed at medium resolution through the Weiss Schwarz card frame — depicts an anime-style character with the immediately recognizable long teal twin-tail hairstyle of Hatsune Miku. The character is seated and facing the viewer at a slight angle, wearing a blue school-uniform-style jacket with a red tie. Round-framed glasses are a distinguishing detail of this 'Deep Sky' costume variant. The background appears to be an interior room, possibly a classroom, with a warm green-tinted or sunlit atmosphere. The overall rendering is clean digital anime art with soft lighting. Resolution at 400x558 is sufficient to confirm costume details and character identity without visual uncertainty.
foreground: anime figure with long teal twin-tails in blue school jacket with red tie and glasses
background: interior room, warm green-tinted light, soft ambient
